title: Old Money Hamptons Editorial Portrait AI
sourceTitle: Old Money Hamptons Editorial Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Old-money Hamptons editorial portrait of tall blonde adult woman with calm and elegant expression, shot in a Slim Aarons-inspired medium-format leisure style. Subject: tall blonde adult woman with calm and elegant expression wears cream cable-knit cashmere sweater, pleated beige tennis skirt, pearl earrings, Hermès silk scarf, and leather flats with calm elegant expression, poised posture, and understated heritage wealth styling. Scene: white wooden porch of a Cape Cod-style house with the ocean visible in the background creates the Cape Cod coastal leisure setting with white wood, warm sunlight, ocean distance, and refined summer atmosphere. Composition: Fixed seated editorial portrait on a porch, relaxed old-money posture, ocean visible behind, medium-format framing, and quiet negative space. Signature Elements: Pose, gesture, or foreground action: seated with relaxed old-money poise and quiet confidence. Preserved old money hamptons editorial portrait source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Slim Aarons-inspired old-money editorial photography, medium-format film, Hamptons leisure, elegant heritage styling, and polished magazine portrait finish. Color Palette: Fixed cream, beige, pearl white, soft tan leather, warm golden sunlight, white porch paint, and muted ocean blue. Lighting: Warm golden-hour sunlight with soft facial highlights, gentle porch shadows, and calm coastal atmosphere. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
